calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment; Notice Of Hrg
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Susan Crozier, #4761.

Miriam Hiser, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Pennsylvania Higher Education Assistance Agency.
No appearaence by defendant Patricia J. Weiss.
Default was entered against defendant on December 6, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Pennsylvania Higher Education Assistance Agency, and against the Defaulted Defendant Patricia J. Weiss as follows:

Damages/Principal - $36,612.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $891.07.
Attorney Fees - $2,370.00.
Costs - $469.00
Late Fees - $85.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,427.29.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
